themes.name: AR/VR
themes.description: Augmented and virtual reality — hardware, platforms, spatial computing, and the evolving interface between digital and physical worlds.

themes.name: Auth and Identity
themes.description: Authentication, identity verification, access management — from passwordless to biometrics to decentralised identity.

themes.name: Mobile Capabilities
themes.description: What mobile platforms can do and where they're headed — device APIs, platform features, cross-platform strategies.

themes.name: Product Leadership
themes.description: Leading product organisations — vision-setting, roadmap ownership, stakeholder management, and the craft of senior product roles.

themes.name: Team Leadership
themes.description: Building, scaling, and nurturing high-performing teams — culture, hiring, psychological safety, and cross-functional dynamics.

themes.name: AI Tools
themes.description: The landscape of AI-powered tools — developer tooling, productivity suites, creative tools, and how they're reshaping workflows.

themes.name: AI Change Management
themes.description: How organisations navigate the human side of AI adoption — resistance, upskilling, role evolution, and cultural transformation.

themes.name: AI Product Leadership
themes.description: Leading product in the age of AI — how AI changes the PM role, AI-native product thinking, and building with LLMs.

themes.name: AI Products
themes.description: Products built on or around AI — what works, what doesn't, and what separates AI features from AI-native products.

themes.name: Product Operations
themes.description: The systems, processes, and infrastructure that make product teams run — tooling, rituals, data pipelines, and operational excellence.

themes.name: Product Discovery
themes.description: How teams find the right thing to build — research methods, experimentation, customer interviews, opportunity mapping.

themes.name: Product Strategy
themes.description: The big bets — positioning, competitive moats, platform vs. feature decisions, and long-term product vision.

themes.name: Product Successes
themes.description: Products that won — what they got right, the decisions that mattered, and the lessons worth stealing.

themes.name: Product Fails
themes.description: Products that stumbled or died — post-mortems, misread markets, execution gaps, and what we can learn from them.

themes.name: Product Underdog Stories
themes.description: Small teams, scrappy products, and unlikely winners — how constraints bred creativity and underdogs beat incumbents.

themes.name: Storytelling Through Product
themes.description: How great products tell stories — narrative design, onboarding as storytelling, brand-product alignment, and emotional UX.

themes.name: Brilliant Ideas with Product Marketing
themes.description: The intersection of product and marketing — launches that landed, positioning that stuck, and creative GTM plays.

themes.name: Android and iOS Launches
themes.description: Mobile app launches — platform-specific strategies, App Store dynamics, launch playbooks, and what separates a splash from a fizzle.

themes.name: Apple and Big Tech Launches
themes.description: How Apple, Google, Microsoft, and others launch products — keynote strategy, ecosystem plays, and what smaller companies can learn.

themes.name: Human Computer Interaction
themes.description: The evolving relationship between people and technology — interaction paradigms, accessibility, cognitive load, and interface futures.

themes.name: Customer Behavior
themes.description: Why customers do what they do — behavioral economics, decision patterns, habit formation, and the psychology behind adoption.

themes.name: Customer Experience
themes.description: End-to-end CX — journey mapping, friction reduction, moments of delight, and building experiences people talk about.

themes.name: Product Design
themes.description: Design as a product discipline — systems thinking, design-engineering collaboration, prototyping culture, and design leadership.

themes.name: Payment Rails
themes.description: The infrastructure beneath payments — card networks, real-time rails, open banking, and how money actually moves.

themes.name: Payments
themes.description: The payments ecosystem — processors, gateways, checkout flows, fraud, compliance, and the product challenges of moving money.

themes.name: Global Payments
themes.description: Payments across borders — FX, local methods, regulatory complexity, and building for a fragmented global market.

themes.name: AI Integration
themes.description: Embedding AI into existing products and workflows — where it adds value, where it creates friction, and how to get the seams right.

themes.name: Digital Transformation
themes.description: Organisations modernising at scale — legacy migration, cultural shifts, technology adoption, and why most transformations stall.

themes.name: Growth Strategy
themes.description: Scaling products and businesses — growth loops, retention mechanics, network effects, and sustainable vs. extractive growth.

themes.name: Adoption Strategy
themes.description: Getting users to stick — onboarding funnels, activation metrics, behavior change, and the science of making products habitual.

themes.name: Customer Onboarding
themes.description: The critical first experience — time-to-value, progressive disclosure, self-serve vs. guided flows, and reducing early churn.

themes.name: Go-to-Market Strategy
themes.description: Bringing products to market — positioning, channel strategy, pricing, launch sequencing, and the art of the GTM plan.
